# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - test
  - deploy

variables:
  GIT_DEPTH: '1'

before_script:
  - 'export MR_TITLE=$(echo "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" | tr -d "\"")'
  - 'export MR_DESCRIPTION=$(echo "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION" | tr -d "\"")'

build:
  stage: build
  script:
    - echo "Building project for MR: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
    - echo "Description: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION"

test:
  stage: test
  script:
    - echo "Running tests for MR: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
  only:
    - merge_requests

deploy:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - echo "Deploying feature: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
    - echo "Description: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION"
    - 'export DEPLOY_TAG=${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}_${MR_TITLE}'
    - git tag -a "$DEPLOY_TAG" -m "Deploy tag for $MR_TITLE: $MR_DESCRIPTION"
    - git push origin "$DEPLOY_TAG"
  only:
    - main
